programme.title: Movie: A Summer Romance
programme.desc: A woman's ranch is her family's legacy, so, when a developer comes to town trying to buy it, she is not overly interested, that is, until he starts trying to win her trust, and her heart.

programme.title: The Office: Special Project
programme.desc: After Dwight gets assigned to a special project at Sabre headquarters in Tallahassee, he and Andy try to decide which Scranton employees get to go with him. Meanwhile, Pam returns from her maternity leave.

programme.title: The Office: Tallahassee
programme.desc: After Dwight and his team arrive in Tallahassee, Dwight competes with his coworkers to impress Sabre special projects president, Nellie Bertram.

programme.title: The Office: After Hours
programme.desc: Andy makes everyone in the office stay late in order to cover for those who went to Florida.

programme.title: The Office: Test the Store
programme.desc: Dwight prepares a theatrical presentation to impress Nellie at the Sabre Store opening.

programme.title: The Office: The Last Day in Florida
programme.desc: Jim tries to save Dwight from being fired after Robert California reveals that he hates Nellie's business plan. Meanwhile, Andy learns that Erin isn't coming back to Scranton.

programme.title: The Office: Get the Girl
programme.desc: Andy makes a life-altering decision and drives across the country to pursue Erin. Meanwhile, Nellie shows up in Scranton and tries to claim the manager position.

programme.title: The Office: Welcome Party
programme.desc: When Robert makes the office throw a welcome party for Nellie, the party planners try to sabotage it. Meanwhile, Andy and Erin practice how Andy will break up with Jessica.

programme.title: The Office: Angry Andy
programme.desc: Andy returns from his romantic quest to find his manhood in jeopardy. As he and Nellie duke it out over the manager's chair, his co-workers offer advice on how to perform.

programme.title: The Office: Fundraiser
programme.desc: An unemployed Andy crashes a fundraiser for the Senator and winds up adopting 12 disabled dogs.

programme.title: The Office: Turf War

programme.title: The Office: Free Family Portrait Studio
programme.desc: A stolen diaper leads to a high-speed car chase. With help from an old boss, Andy goes undercover as a janitor and stages a takeover.

programme.title: The Office: New Guys
programme.desc: Jim and Dwight are thrown off balance by the arrival of two young employees. Andy comes back from leadership training with a desire for vengeance against Nellie.

programme.title: The Office: Roy's Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding toast of Pam's ex fiancé Roy causes Pam and Jim to examine their relationship for buried secrets.

programme.title: The Office: Andy's Ancestry

programme.desc: The good news is we have a witness to a murder. The bad news is he suffers from Prosopagnosia, commonly known as facial recognition blindness, and he can't recognize the killer. The Rizzolis prepare for a visit from their scheming cousin, Carlo.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: A Bad Seed Grows
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl is murdered and left in a cage, Jane and Maura must overcome the ethical dilemma of a psychiatrist and the stiff opposition of a fussy prosecutor to find the killer. Meanwhile, Jane has couch issues and Frankie sees UFOs.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Nice to Meet You, Dr. Isles
programme.desc: When the jeweler to Boston's super cool and famous dies, our investigation leads us to a member of the Isles family we've never met. And that leads us to a secret Maura has been keeping for almost all of her life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Love Taps
programme.desc: The murder of a college student takes an odd turn when Jane and Maura discover he had 32 girlfriends. Uncovering who killed him and why leads them into a world of app developers, virtual boyfriends, and relationships built on lies.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sister Sister
programme.desc: When a dog trainer is found dead at home, her champion Rottweiler is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Fake It 'til You Make It

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Slam Donks
programme.desc: Tony Yeager and Whitfield roll into town with a group of local Donk-driving racers ready to call JJ out. The familiar foes have a plan to get inside JJ's head by going after the girls and hopefully pull out a win against the MSO.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Reigning for Benji's
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: JJ brings in the country's best small-tire racers, including some big-name foes, to challenge the MSO for a shot at $16,000.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: OG Armdrop
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: The second round of JJ's small-tire race kicks off with the MSO fighting for a win despite only having half of their team remaining.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Smooth as Tennessee
programme.desc: Nashville street racers call out the MSO to see who really runs the streets of Tennessee. Memphis never backs down from a challenge, but with Ziptie out of commission and Heifer having trouble, the team must really step up if they want to win.

programme.title: Farmtruck and Azn Project: Farmtruck and AZN
programme.desc: From their iconic Farmtruck to their unbelievable Gonorail, Farmtruck and AZN have long been known for their crazy builds. Now the guys are taking it to a new level by opening their shop and revealing the crazy new surprises they have up their sleeves.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Burning Rubber Down Under
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN can't say no to an invitation to Summernats, an annual burnout competition in Australian. They ship a new truck to Australia, and get some help to get the truck ready in time to learn the true definition of burning rubber.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Smooth as Tennessee
programme.desc: Nashville street racers call out the MSO to see who really runs the streets of Tennessee. Memphis never backs down from a challenge, but with Ziptie out of commission and Heifer having trouble, the team must really step up if they want to win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Shut Up and Drive
programme.desc: Chuck and Ryan look back at some of the biggest rivalries we've seen on the 405 list, while Farmtruck and AZN go head to head in a junky, clunker race. Then, Chuck and Ryan take a look forward at everything that's coming up on this season.

programme.title: American Chopper: GTO, Bro!
programme.desc: OCC builds a bike inspired by a 1965 GTO, but this massive job may cause Senior to miss the first deadline of his career. When Junior designs a bike for a corporate client, changes in fabrication throw a wrench in the schedule.

programme.title: American Chopper: Drop the Mikey
programme.desc: When the OCC crew builds an old school chopper for a longtime fan, Senior must rely on Mikey to get the job done. Junior designs an awe-inspiring trike for a repeat client, and father and son come into the home stretch on the Yankee build.

programme.title: American Chopper: Road Warriors
programme.desc: Senior takes a risk and starts a Spartan Race-inspired build before meeting the client, then has to change course to accommodate his requests, while Junior designs a monster trike, but fabrication troubles may mean missing the unveil.

programme.title: American Chopper: Yanks for the Memories
programme.desc: Senior and the OCC guys auction off a military-themed bike to benefit families of fallen soldiers, and Junior designs a western-inspired motorcycle for country music star Clay Walker.

programme.title: American Chopper: Chopper up the Middle
programme.desc: Senior and Junior begin restoring a 1951 Buick, but don't always go by the book. Senior risks everything by moving designs away from their famous choppers. Junior challenges himself to build a streamlined bike for the MLB Network to impress his dad.

programme.title: American Chopper: Teutul Recall
programme.desc: Junior designs a bike inspired by a futuristic big rig. The OCC team builds a military style bike with a sidecar to benefit a foundation for wounded veterans.

programme.title: American Chopper: Senior's Moment
programme.desc: Senior goes back to his roots and designs a throwback brand of affordable motorcycles to see from the OCC Showroom. Junior builds a bike using multiple aluminum parts.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future: Part 1
programme.desc: Elon Musk and the greatest minds from SpaceX and NASA are on the verge of making space history. Behind-the-scenes access reveals how these pioneers dream up and test new technology that will make trips to the moon, Mars and beyond commonplace.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future: Part 2
programme.desc: Elon Musk joins great minds from SpaceX and NASA to make space history. Together, the visionary pioneers dream up and test new, cutting-edge tech that will make space travel commonplace.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: America Returns to Space
programme.desc: NASA and SpaceX join forces to reach a new milestone in space exploration: the first crewed orbital mission launched from U.S. soil in almost ten years. Coverage from Kennedy Space Center goes behind the scenes to reveal history in the making.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Coast Guard Heroes

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Katie, who survived a double lung transplant, is looking for the perfect dress to celebrate her new beginning. Molly is a debutante looking for a dress to signal her transition into womanhood.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Picky Brides
programme.desc: Violet wants a tight and sexy gown to wear at her Dominican Republic wedding. After visiting five other bridal salons, Rachel hopes Kleinfeld's will be her last stop.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Requests Like None of the Rest
programme.desc: Amanda is looking for a dress with tons of embellishment including sparkles and glitter.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Nothing Ordinary Here

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: If You've Got it, Flaunt It
programme.desc: Kia is a pro-basketball player embracing her height, as she looks for the perfect long dress for her six-inch heels. Comedian Christie looks for a dress to show off what her mama gave her. Queen Precious has lost 100 pounds and hopes her dress still fits.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Smother's Day

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Worse Than a Haunted House

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Hoo, This Reeks!
programme.desc: Kathy's extreme hoarding forced her 12-year-old son to move out of their home.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: The Stench Is Amazing
programme.desc: If Tim doesn't grow up and get his home cleaned before his inheritance runs out, he'll lose the house and end up out on the street. A similar fate is in store for twin brothers Lorrin and Orin if their decades-long compulsion can't be curbed.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: My Teeth Are Lost in the Pile

programme.title: Storage Wars: Chairman of the Hoard
programme.desc: Rumours run wild in Orange, California when six lockers, owned by one tenant, go up for auction. Dave and Darrell vie for a unit with a $12,000 payday.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Skullduggery

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buyers on the Storm
programme.desc: Darrell bids on a locker with a 27,000-dollar payoff; Dave bids on a unit with a stockpile of antiques.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hang 'Em High Desert
programme.desc: The buyers return to the high desert, where one discovers an antique toy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Unclaimed Baggage
programme.desc: The buyers square off in Costa Mesa, California. Antiques and personal items from the past are about to dictate these buyers' futures.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Land of the Loss
programme.desc: The buyers return to Santa Ana, California but the reunion is anything but fruitful for them.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Almost the Greatest Show on Earth
programme.desc: The auction turns into a circus as the buyers head to Irvine, California where tensions boil over.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bowling for Dollars

programme.title: Storage Wars: Get Him to the Mayan

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fu Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: The buyers head to the upscale retirement community of Laguna Hills, California.

programme.title: Storage Wars: I'm the New Mogul
programme.desc: The buyers venture to Los Angeles, where they find themselves in a different kind of auction, called a vault auction.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Winner Winner Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: A buyer gambles on a locker that turns out to be anything but chicken feed.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Auction Sesame
programme.desc: The buyers invade the best little city in the USA, Azusa, California.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Empire Strikes Out
programme.desc: The buyers head back to Ontario, Calif. to search for valuable finds.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Smoke 'Em If You Find 'Em

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Drone Wars
programme.desc: The buyers are back in Gardena, CA, where one buyer drops seven grand on a unit full of construction equipment, hoping to make a nice profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Brandi's First Time
programme.desc: The buyers are back in Santa Ana, CA except for Jarrod, which forces Brandi to go to the auction alone.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hooray for Holly-Weird

programme.title: Storage Wars: Don't Bid So Close to Me
programme.desc: The buyers do battle in Rancho Cucamonga, CA. where Jarrod and Brandi find a vintage mask.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Faces in the Forest

programme.title: The Vet Life: Fly, Miss Thang, Fly
programme.desc: Dr. Ross examines a barred owl that was hit by a car, but hopes to fly again. Jamie Bell, a dog who hasn't eaten in days, is hiding a secret, a big, fluffy secret. The docs visit an animal rescue center and get up close with some Texas wildlife.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Little Dog, Big Problem
programme.desc: Dr. Blue uncovers a big problem for a paralyzed Yorkie. Dr. Ross takes care of a pair of roosters involved in a barnyard braw, before joining Dr. Lavigne on a hyena consultation.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Award Winning Docs
programme.desc: The doctors are honored for their contributions to the community. Before the event, the clinic has animals in need of care, including a goat with a badly twisted leg, a Great Dane with a life-threatening condition and a bulldog rescued from a puppy mill.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Doctor Dads
programme.desc: Dr. Ross starts off the day with a trio of mischievous ferrets suffering from a skin condition. Bella, a 9-year-old Shepherd, is diagnosed with an extremely large tumor, and her family is faced with difficult decisions throughout her treatment.

programme.desc: Remy's plan for his whole life is thrown into question when he is unprepared for a violin recital. Later, Gramma becomes a rideshare driver, only to find her best customers are thieves.

programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores the mysterious oceans of our solar system, where the latest discoveries provide new clues in the search for alien life.

programme.title: The Planets: Jupiter: King of the Planets
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino leads a journey to Jupiter, the biggest and most extreme planet in our Solar System. Using new discoveries and the latest science, he investigates Jupiter's deepest mysteries and if it is actually our Sun's secret twin.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Cosmic Threats
programme.desc: Catastrophic dangers have a constant presence in Earth's delicate journey through the universe, and now with the help of the latest science and cutting edge technology, experts investigate the many cosmic perils that threaten our planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets of Time Travel
programme.desc: Time travel might be more possible than we ever imagined, and today, cutting-edge technology and the latest research into black holes and wormholes is helping experts get steps closer to discovering how to travel through time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Death Orbit
programme.desc: Earth's journey through the universe is a perilous one. New discoveries reveal that our planet is heading toward a mysterious area of the cosmos that could eject us out of the Milky Way and into oblivion.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Extinction
programme.desc: Asteroids strike, planets collide, black holes blast out death rays, volcanoes erupt and ice engulfs the planet. These are the universe's weapons of extinction. They've happened before - wiping out entire species, and they will happen again.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets of Time Travel
programme.desc: Time travel might be more possible than we ever imagined, and today, cutting-edge technology and the latest research into black holes and wormholes is helping experts get steps closer to discovering how to travel through time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Birth of the Earth
programme.desc: The Earth was formed by a series of cosmic cataclysms including the most powerful blast in the Universe. Look at whether the same chain of events could have created other earths inhabited by creatures like us.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Fire in the Cockpit
programme.desc: Some believe the fire on Apollo 1 that killed three astronauts was a top-secret cover-up, and a team of experts investigate if this disaster was a tragic accident or part of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Conspiracy of the Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge tech to hunt for the lost NASA tapes that recorded the Apollo 11 moon landing and shed light on a possible conspiracy, as some believe their disappearance is part of a cover-up to hide the truth.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: The Hollywood Conspiracy
programme.desc: Some believe that the moon's waving American flag is the smoking gun that NASA faked the moon landing, and as a team of experts investigate this strange piece of evidence, the trail leads all the way to some of Hollywood's biggest names.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: NASA Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of America's greatest achievements is also one of its most controversial, and now, a team of experts investigate if there was a conspiracy to fake the moon landing, uncovering a secret report on hundreds of Nazis' involved in the Apollo space program.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Killing Armstrong
programme.desc: Apollo 11's lunar module nearly killed Neil Armstrong during training, and some believe this close-call could explain a conspiracy to fake the moon landing. A team of experts investigate if dangers that the Apollo 11 crew faced were motive for a cover-up.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Doomsday Forest
programme.desc: When mysterious structures are discovered deep in a remote forest, experts investigate if this strange site was the long-lost birthplace of a top-secret Nazi project that produced some of the deadliest weapons the world had ever seen.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future
programme.desc: Elon Musk and experts from SpaceX and NASA are on a mission to revolutionize space exploration. Special inside access reveals how their cutting-edge spacecraft technology will carry humans to the moon, Mars and beyond.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: America Returns to Space
programme.desc: NASA and SpaceX join forces to reach a new milestone in space exploration: the first crewed orbital mission launched from U.S. soil in almost ten years. Coverage from Kennedy Space Center goes behind the scenes to reveal history in the making.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Tombs of the Gold Kingdom
programme.desc: Strange satellite images taken above the Nile Valley could point investigators to long-lost relics buried in an unexplored city of the dead. What they find could reveal new secrets of Kush, a once-mighty kingdom of untold gold and treasure.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friendly Foes
programme.desc: The double homicide of a young mother and her 21-month-old daughter sends Galax's tiny police force on a frenzied mission to stop unspeakable evil in its tracks.

programme.title: Homicide City: Bingham Street Blues
programme.desc: Northeast Philadelphia's Crescentville neighborhood is known for tranquility seldom seen in major cities. But when a mother, her boyfriend, and daughter are found slain at home, the community searches for answers.

programme.title: Homicide City: Killer Moves
programme.desc: When beloved a DJ, Alberto Martino, is found bludgeoned to death outside his radio station, it's appears to be a robbery gone wrong. But police quickly learn the Martino was not a random victim, but the focus of a carefully orchestrated homicide.

programme.title: Homicide City: Nine Months Murdered
programme.desc: When expectant mother Natise Johnson is found murdered days before she is due to give birth to her first child, Philly detectives focus on those closest to her. But soon they find Natise's life is much more complicated than anyone ever knew.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Mysteries: In Too Deep and Death at the Beauty School
programme.desc: A young soldier in Fort Stewart, GA quits a dangerous militia, but his decision has deadly consequences. Plus, when a cosmetology student in Wenatchee, WA disappears from school and is found dead by a river, no one can believe who killed her.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Mysteries: Burned Alive and a Mom Missing

programme.desc: When trusted legal assistant Gail Spencer fails to show up for work, her coworkers are rightfully concerned. But as the sordid details of her abduction come to light, suddenly it seems like someone at the office may know more than they are letting on.

programme.desc: When Peggy Klinke returns to school to pursue her dream of becoming a doctor, she catches the eye of fellow student Patrick Kennedy. But their relationship eventually leads them down a terrifying path of jealousy, obsession, and murder.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Let Go
programme.desc: A woman believes she may finally be free of her possessive ex-boyfriend, but months later, now in a new relationship, she can't help but feel she's being watched. The stalker's true identity is not at all what she imagined.

programme.desc: When beloved a DJ, Alberto Martino, is found bludgeoned to death outside his radio station, it's appears to be a robbery gone wrong. But police quickly learn the Martino was not a random victim, but the focus of a carefully orchestrated homicide.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Married to Death

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Blood and Oil
programme.desc: In 2012, a missing person case in North Dakota grabs the attention of Homeland Security. Investigators unravel a scheme involving stolen fracking profits, a ruthless conman and his murderous partner, and at least two victims of their boundless greed.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Two adopted sisters are inseparable until the social pressures of high school and bullying drive a wedge of violence between them.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Bye Bye Baby
programme.desc: Deep-seated envy between two pregnant sisters leads to a twisted murder plot in an unsuspecting Midwestern town. This unspeakable crime leaves the Merrifield family destroyed forever.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder Among Friends
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, a popular teen goes for a run around her hometown in Maine. Days later, her savagely beaten body is found. But what happened remains a mystery for years, until her mother intervenes and forces police to re-examine the case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: A celebratory night turns deadly for the Whitaker family when they are gunned down at home. When investigators uncover a conspiracy, it will test one man's ability to forgive as he fights to save the criminal mastermind from the death penalty.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone Girls
programme.desc: When three women from three different decades meet their death or go missing under mysterious circumstances, authorities are forced to examine the one thing they had in common: they all fell in love with the same man.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Springfield Three
programme.desc: On June 6, 1992, Suzie Streeter and Stacy McCall are out celebrating high school graduation. By morning, the teens are missing, along with Suzie's mother. The case leads police on a nationwide search as they work to solve this baffling mystery.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Risk-Takers and Renegades
programme.desc: It's a five-round battle to name the most badass of them all. In one corner, Evel Knievel, the original daredevil with the record for most broken bones takes on the People's President, Andrew Jackson, the Billionaire Howard Hughes and General Patton.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: It's the final five-round battle of the season to name who's the most Badass. In one corner, George Washington, our first President takes on notorious General Douglas MacArthur and Amelia Earhart takes on boxing legend Jack Johnson.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: John Glenn, Bruce Lee, Harry Truman and Hunter S. Thompson all lived life without boundaries and they all have one thing in common, they're badass Americans.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The New World
programme.desc: There is more to the explorers who discovered America than we have been told. Learn that Christopher Columbus never stepped foot in North America and Hernán Cortés didn't defeat the Aztecs by himself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Booze and Bullets
programme.desc: Our memories of the roaring twenties and lawless thirties are more myth than truth. Learn the shocking realities about prohibition and that rogue's gallery of gangsters including John Dillinger and Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Coast Guard at War
programme.desc: Trained for domestic lifesaving and port protection, the Coast Guard performed a little-known combat role in the Vietnam War. The untold stories of the USCG are revealed with rare footage and personal accounts from those who were there.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Pool-a-Vida
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Florida to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home. Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Keeping the Dreams Alive
programme.desc: Chase and the team will have their hands full as they navigate the treacherous hillside while they stabilize the camp and restore it so the family can continue to enjoy it for at least another 42 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.desc: An architecture student builds a futuristic tiny home that can withstand the harsh Canadian winters and be his home base while he trains for the Olympics. Every aspect of this high-tech tiny is overflowing with intricate and meticulous detail.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fishing for a Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories in Maryland
programme.desc: Frequent visitors to the popular beach town of Ocean City, MD, decide to take a big chance and invest in property for their family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Living Through Renovations on North Padre Island, Texas
programme.desc: Fallon and Mark Jennings are Texas natives with a big Texas family, and they're on the hunt for the perfect waterside home on North Padre Island.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Beachfront or Bust in Myrtle Beach
programme.desc: Brad grew up spending summers in North Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. Now he's ready to find a vacation home for his family, and local broker Jason Moore is just the man to help them find it, along with some help from his wife and kids.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Nashville, TN
programme.desc: Casey's mouthwatering mission brings him to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet: three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.title: Good Eats: Immersion Therapy
programme.desc: The last decade has seen a lot of change in the food world, but no device has made more of a difference than the immersion circulator. Alton Brown makes an argument for having one in every kitchen by featuring dishes such as a perfect rump roast.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Cake on Every Plate: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2003 and reinvents the cake that so many folks complained about way back when. This time, the cake isn't just good: it's golden.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Raising the Bar: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this cocktail show from 2006 with a new martini, a new mint julep and perfectly clear ice cubes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Pressure: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads his original pressure cooker episode with a brand-new broth and his take on the Vietnamese classic, pho.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Steak Your Claim
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' his classic steak show with an entirely new recipe for a reverse-seared ribeye steak. He also reviews thermometer basics, how to cure a cast-iron skillet and why pre-salting meat can be the right thing to do.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern returns to the European epicenter of fashion, art and commerce. Paris is home to rich and masterful cuisine, and Andrew finds the best places to get everything from traditional pot au feu topped with with bone marrow to fresh steak tartare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Louisville, Kentucky
programme.desc: Andrew explores Louisville icons like country ham, burgoo stew, and derby pie.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern goes on a gastronomic tour of Las Vegas, NV. From quail breast stuffed with foie gras and mouth-watering Waygu steaks to classic veal Parmigiana and tantalizing Thai, Sin City has it all.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Rico

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Tagalong Polliwog/ Sparkly Star Switcheroo
programme.desc: Kermit's nephew, Robin, comes to visit and everyone is excited to play with him, but Kermit is very protective. When Rizzo is sad about not making a wish on a shooting star, Summer paints a sparkly star to cheer him up.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Asteroid Accident / All About Asteroids
programme.desc: Owlette causes an asteroid accident. While trying to make it right, the PJ Masks meet another night-time hero, Newton! Newton likes the PJ Masks, but also likes his solitude.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Hanami Hijinks! / Happy Harajuku Helpers!
programme.desc: Daisy wants to celebrate Hanami with a perfect picnic, unfortunately things go a little haywire! The Happy Helpers participate in the annual Harajuku Fest in Tokyo!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Rakhi Mystery/ Mystery Below the Palace
programme.desc: When the bracelets that Mira and her friends made for the Rakhi holiday disappear, Mira sets out to find them before the celebration starts. When strange sounds are heard at the palace, Queen Shanti asks Mira to find out what is causing the ruckus.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Light for the Lighthouse / Music City Mishap
programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Daddy Delivery/ Junior Flyer JP
programme.desc: While Pip and Freddy make a delivery on Father's Day, a baby Hedgehog gets stuck atop a hill and is too afraid to come down. Pip and Freddy help JP become a Super Duper Flier again after he gets demoted for failing to take a test.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Going Upppppppppp!/ Gone Fishin'!
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang compete in the first Hot Dog Hills Hot Air Balloon Race.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daisy's Photo Finish! / Super-Charged: Daisy's Grande Goal
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy travel to Brazil's Amazon rainforest to help Daisy's cousin get a picture of a rare bird. During a Roadster Soccer match, Daisy's competitiveness gets out of hand.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Firefighter Pups / Hike Paw
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Don't Rain on My Pug-rade/ Their Royal Pug-ness
programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Night of the Cat/ Catboy Does it Again
programme.desc: Catboy hears of a way to increase his cat power, and enlists Gekko and Owlette to help. Catboy falls prey to a Romeo remote that rewinds all action, making the night last forever.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy's Butterfly Brigade/ Owlette the Winner
programme.desc: Blaming her moths for past defeats, Luna Girl steals a swarm of butterflies to be her new sidekick. Luna Girl and Owlette compete to win the biggest and best toy.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Goes Goofy
programme.desc: Goofy gets cloned after getting sprayed by Prof. Von Drake's latest experimental goo.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Gone
programme.desc: Detective Minnie, Secret Spy Daisy and Captain Clarabelle, otherwise known as 'The Go-Getters,' set out on a case to find Goofy, who has mysteriously gone missing.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Wild Tire/ Sittin' Kitty
programme.desc: Mickey tries to surprise racing champion Jiminy Johnson with a tire from his first roadster. Minnie and Daisy wind up on a search throughout Hot Dog Hills when the cat they are pet-sitting escapes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Hiking Honeybees
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Clubhouse
programme.desc: Mickey leaves Donald in charge of the Clubhouse. But he and Goofy accidentally turn a small mess into a big mess, so the whole gang must work together to tidy up in time for a visit from Mother Goose, Clarabelle and her trio of singing chickens.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Space Captain Donald
programme.desc: When Pluto's bouncy ball bounces all the way into outer space, Mickey and our friends, led by Space Captain Donald, take a trip to the Moon to retrieve the ball.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Bird
programme.desc: Goofy finds a lost bird and Mickey helps him bring it back home to his mom in the forest.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Pet Project
programme.desc: Daisy ends up with three pets for the Pet Parade, a baby elephant, giraffe and a bunny.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Pajama Party
programme.desc: Minnie's Clubhouse pajama party turns into a camp out under the stars in order to accommodate last minute guest Willie the Giant.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Brand New Clubhouse
programme.desc: When Donald complains everyone is in his way, Mickey and pals help him build his own clubhouse.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Go-Getters
programme.desc: Detective Minnie, Secret Spy Daisy and Captain Clarabelle band together to form the Go-Getters in order to help stop a group of giant baby chicks who are running loose in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Chuggington: It's Not Easy Being Clean / Monkey Sitting
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Bee Story
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Minnie's friend, Buzzby the Bee, find her way back home after a strong wind blows her away from her sunflower in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Rockin' Roadsters!/ Safari, So Goody
programme.desc: The gang is invited to compete in Billy B's Hot Rod Switcheroo! The Happy Helpers become safari guides for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Donald's Roadster Round-Up / The Daisy Dance!
programme.desc: On a trip to the convenience store, Donald and Pluto lose all the roadsters; The Happy Helpers take over Clarabelle's dance class.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Roommate/ Minnie's Bow-tel!
programme.desc: When Pete needs a place to crash, Mickey offers to let him stay at his place. Unfortunately, Pete is the worst roommate ever! The Happy Helpers redecorate Mr. Doozy's hotel.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Lemur Play/ How the Dog Park Was Won
programme.desc: The pugs go to Madagascar to learn about lemurs. When a big dog takes Keia's toy at the dog park, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to retrieve the toy!

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Case of the Chiseling Chiselers / A Patchwork Mystery
programme.desc: When the royal sword goes missing, Mira agrees to help Veer find it. Then, when a tapestry that Priya created for Jalpur's anniversary celebration winds up nowhere to be found, Mira sets out on the case to find it before the party begins.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: Bluey: Shops / The Pool / Blue Mountains
programme.desc: Bluey and her friends want to play a game of 'Shops'; Bluey and her family take a trip to the pool; The family plays with hand puppets.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bye Bye, Butterfly/ A Seat at the Theatre
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Lost Lovey/ Diggity Dog
programme.desc: Mia loses Lovey, so Pip and Freddy go on a wild chase to find it. The Fliers' delivery is in jeopardy when their puppy student becomes the master at digging.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: The Flimsy Grumby Bat/ Rockstar Ruby and the Toys
programme.desc: When Clarence the bat accidentally gets wet, he is unable to stand up because his cardboard is all soggy and flimsy; Ruby is a rockstar doll with a big personality and lots of flair. When her microphone button breaks, she is crushed.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four / Feelin' Antsy
programme.desc: When a performance by Bob's favourite band, The Walruses, is canceled, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to ensure the show goes on. Then, when ants invade playcare, the pugs must find a way to get them out.

programme.title: Bluey: Favourite Thing / Daddy Dropoff / Sleepytime
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Secret Agent Double-Oh-Frog / A Tale of Two Twins
programme.desc: Follow the Muppet Babies on various adventures as they let their imaginations take flight.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Turning Into Turner/ The Wand That Got Away
programme.desc: Using Timmy's DNA, Crocker pretends to be Timmy from the future. Cosmo loses his wand and Timmy and the gang must help find it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Whittle Me This/ Mayor May Not
programme.desc: Catman thinks Timmy has been kidnapped. He mistakes Chloe for Catgirl and enlists her help to save Timmy.Timmy wishes Dad was Mayor, but Timmy gets tortured by the paparazzi and risks having his fairies discovered.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Time Flies/ Prank Calls
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany are convinced Simon has vanished back in time and go all out in an attempt to bring him back. A prank call by Alvin gets out of hand when the person on the other end of the line vows to track him down.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simsky/ Lucky Day
programme.desc: Simon is alarmed to discover he's been tagging private property in his sleep. Alvin's luck goes from bad to worse after Theodore finds a four-leaf clover and everything starts going his way.

programme.title: Movie: Good Burger
programme.desc: Two teenagers have a wild summer trying to save their local burger joint.

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: The Loud House: Change of Heart/ Health Kicked
programme.desc: Clyde, desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, enlists Leni's help. Worried that Mom and Dad are hurting their health from not being active, the kids encourage them to exercise.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman Begins/ Plankton's Good Eye
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Branacle Boy from the heroes themselves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Are You Happy Now?/ Planet of the Jellyfish
programme.desc: SpongeBob helps Squidward make a happiest memory for himself; SpongeBob and Sandy have to defeat an evil Jellien overlord who's replaced everyone in Bikini Bottom with clones.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: A freak jousting accident lands Bob and Pat in a medieval Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Splinter/ Slide Whistle Stooges
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally gets a splinter, but he's afraid Mr. Krabs will send him home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick sneak into the Treedome while Sandy is hibernating to play with the snow. Despite her warning, they wake up a sleeping Sandy and then must face the sleepwalking beast she has become.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy go away for the weekend; Bob becomes a stand-up comic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Enemy-in-Law/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI
programme.desc: Krabs is horrified when he learns that the secret paramour dating his mother is Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dear Vikings/ Ditchin'
programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Fish in Town/ Love That Squid
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in and becomes Squidward’s best friend.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Girly Squirrely/ Birthday Battle
programme.desc: Catman thinks that Timmy has been kidnapped. Timmy wishes that his dad was mayor.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Fruit Scoot Boogie
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Baymax Returns Part I and II
programme.desc: Join Hiro right after he learns that Baymax is lost in the portal forever. He discovers the chip that Tadashi designed to create Baymax. Hiro begins school as the new prodigy at San Fransokyo Institute of Technology and sets out to rebuild Baymax.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred's Bro-Tillion
programme.desc: When supervillain Baron Von Steamer crashes Fred's Bro-Tillion, the Big Hero 6 team springs into action.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Issue 188
programme.desc: As Hiro tries to find a way to connect to classmate Karmi, Go Go and Fred dive deep into comic book mythology to defeat High Voltage, a mother-daughter supervillain duo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Roommates 2
programme.desc: Go Go and Honey Lemon quickly clash when they become roommates. Meanwhile, when a thief steals Honey Lemon’s chem-lab purse, it accidentally turns him into a monster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Failure Mode
programme.desc: Hiro becomes demoralized when his latest school project fails spectacularly.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Aunt Cass Goes Out
programme.desc: After Aunt Cass nearly figures out Hiro’s secret life as a member of Big Hero 6, Hiro plays matchmaker to find Aunt Cass a boyfriend to distract her.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Impatient Patient
programme.desc: Even though he is clearly sick, Hiro refuses to listen to Baymax or his teammates and insists that he should not stay on the sidelines during a battle with the Mad Jacks.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Food Fight
programme.desc: When Aunt Cass stumbles into an underground cooking competition, she thrives and becomes addicted to the excitement.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Killer App
programme.desc: Wasabi’s need for order clashes with Hiro’s chaotic work style when they collaborate on a school project. They must learn to respect and embrace their differences to save the day.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: Daytrip of Doom!
programme.desc: The nephews take Webby to Funso's Fun Zone and have a dangerous run-in with the Beagle Boys. Donald rebels against Mrs. Beakley's strict "house rules."

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: DuckTales: Sky Pirates...In the Sky!
programme.desc: Tired of being ignored by his family, Dewey’s search for attention goes too far when he falls in with flamboyant Don Karnage and his cutthroat gang of Singing Sky Pirates.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape To/ From Atlantis
programme.desc: Dewey's attempts to impress Scrooge on a trip to the Lost City of Atlantis leads to trouble. Donald tries to protect the boys from his new employer who is trying to destroy them.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Missing Links of Moorshire!
programme.desc: Dewey's natural golf abilities challenge Scrooge's ego while a seemingly innocent, mystical golf course leads the group into trouble.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Inspiration! Challenging Valt!
programme.desc: Blading superstar Valt Aoi visits Dante for a friendly battle before opening the Bey Carnival; once the tournament begins, the Victories will need to get the hang of the Hyper Stadium if they hope to win.

programme.desc: Andy must man up when his Dad blows all the family money. When Dwight is interviewed on local radio, Jim and the office torture him with bizarre call ins.

programme.title: The Office: The Whale
programme.desc: Dwight finds himself needing to be able to sell to women so Pam and the ladies help him out.

programme.title: The Office: The Target
programme.desc: Angela discovers her husband's affair with Oscar and goes to Dwight for help. Jim needs a favour from Stanley and Phyllis who milk it for all it's worth.

programme.title: The Office: Lice
programme.desc: Pam accidentally brings lice into the office and lets Meredith take the fall. Meanwhile, Jim has a fantastic day in Philly wooing a potential business associate.

programme.title: The Office: Suit Warehouse
programme.desc: Dwight and Clark pose as a father and son in order to sell a suit warehouse.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Loyalty
programme.desc: Dwight tries to prevent Darryl from moving to Athlead; Jim misses Cece's recital when a big investor visits his new company.

programme.title: The Office: Junior Salesman
programme.desc: David tasks Dwight with finding a new part time salesman to fill in for Jim. Meanwhile, Pam tries to figure out who will be her new desk mate and Erin tries to find her birth parents with Pete's help.

programme.title: The Office: Vandalism
programme.desc: When Pam asks the office to help her track down the vandal who defaced her mural, Dwight and Nellie spring to action. Darryl has difficulty dealing with the cleanliness habits of Jim in their shared Philly apartment.

programme.title: The Office: Couples Discount
programme.desc: The office pairs off into pretend couples to take advantage of a Valentine's Day discount at a local mini mall.

programme.title: The Office: Moving On
programme.desc: Pam interviews for a job in Philadelphia with a manager who gives her deja vu. Dwight brings Angela with him on a mission to clean his elderly Aunt Shirley.
