programme.desc: Pam interviews for a job in Philadelphia with a manager who gives her deja vu. Dwight brings Angela with him on a mission to clean his elderly Aunt Shirley.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: July 13, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Insheeption
programme.desc: When Stan is sent to the school counsellor because he's holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Hitting rock bottom, Stan finds himself without a job, no bicycle and the only way out of his situation is to coach the peewee hockey team. Stan is about to find out that being a coach means facing his past, reliving a life he would rather leave behind.

programme.title: South Park: Trapped in the Closet
programme.desc: Scientologists converge on Stan's house after he is identified as the reincarnation of L. Ron Hubbard. One A-lister locks himself in the closet and refuses to come out, after Stan criticizes his 'talent.'

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies
programme.desc: When Kenny contracts a deadly disease, Cartman refuses to let his friend die. He speaks before Congress in favour of stem-cell research that could potentially save Kenny's life.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Incredible Gift
programme.desc: After sustaining a severe head injury, Cartman appears to have the power to see into the future. South Park detectives are quick to enlist his help in cracking unsolved murder cases.

programme.title: South Park: Reverse Cowgirl
programme.desc: An unspeakable tragedy occurs when one of the boys leaves the toilet seat up.

programme.title: South Park: Tonsil Trouble
programme.desc: After a routine tonsillectomy goes horribly wrong, Cartman comes face to face with his own mortality.

programme.title: South Park: The China Problem
programme.desc: With the rest of the American people haunted by the memory of a recent tragic event, only Butters will stand with Cartman as he confronts the Chinese.

programme.title: South Park: Cash for Gold
programme.desc: Cartman launches his own gem shopping channel.

programme.title: South Park: Dead Celebrities
programme.desc: Ike is being tormented by paranormal forces. Kyle brings in professional ghost hunters to help save his little brother.

programme.title: South Park: SHOTS!!!
programme.desc: Randy celebrates the success of Tegridy Farms while Cartman refuses to get a shot.

programme.title: South Park: More Crap
programme.desc: Stan's dad Randy becomes South Park's hometown hero when the guys down at the local bar see the size of his most recent crap. Drunk with his new-found fame, Randy attempts to break a world set by Bono.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: 5:26
programme.desc: When an old watch is found inside a balloon of cocaine in a dead woman's stomach, figuring out its significance becomes the key to protecting Jane and the people she loves.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: When Maura is abducted, nothing will stand in the way of Jane and the team bringing her home. Far away, Maura discovers a conspiracy that is bigger than just her kidnapping, with Jane as its ultimate target.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Murderjuana
programme.desc: A security guard foils a robbery when he kills one of the robbers, despite being wounded himself. Jane and Maura work together to solve the case after the search for the robber's accomplice raises some puzzling questions.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Scared to Death
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered in a grisly scene reminiscent of a horror movie, leading the team to uncover a frightening 'game' in which people pay to experience terror.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bomb Voyage

programme.desc: When a State Trooper is killed in Maine, the getaway car is traced back to the mastermind of the attacks on Jane.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act
programme.desc: Experts empower women to seek personal and professional growth while managing a career, family and home.

programme.title: The Closer: Blindsided
programme.desc: In an effort to get good PR for the department, Deputy Chief Johnson takes a journalist on a ride-along. When the Crown Vic is targeted and shot at, Brenda is forced to live under 24-hour police protection, while being the key witness in a case.

programme.title: The Closer: Culture Shock
programme.desc: When a Chinese businesswoman is found dead on the tour bus she and her husband operate, Brenda and the squad must dig deep to investigate her past life. Meanwhile, Brenda's parents reveal to the squad that Brenda and Fritz are engaged.

programme.title: The Closer: Lover's Leap
programme.desc: A car belonging to a Department of Homeland Security employee is found wrecked at the bottom of Mulholland Drive. Priority Homicide is brought in to uncover the details surrounding the driver's death, but the investigation leads Brenda close to home.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Two Shots: Move Forward
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a shooting, the team must use every tool at their disposal to find Alice Sands and bring her to justice before she destroys Jane's life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dangerous Curve Ahead
programme.desc: While the entire Boston Police Department searches for Alice Sands, the team investigates a car crash that isn't all it seems. In the midst of all of this, a new romance blossoms.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Bling in The Big Apple
programme.desc: Brianna and Bill reveal to her family that they are moving to Miami. Katie, Kolton, and Julia travel to North Carolina to spend time with Katie's mother. Drew whisks Rosie off on a whirlwind vacation to New York.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: A Constructive Proposal
programme.desc: Brianna looks to find new friends in Miami, but after a night out, Bill questions her motives. Rosie grapples with the idea of eloping with Drew.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: The Secret Is Out
programme.desc: Rosie has her bachelorette party and tells her friends the truth about how she met Drew. Brianna flies home to Dallas after a fight with Bill.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Diamonds Aren't Forever
programme.desc: After Bill and Bri make up, Bill considers taking their relationship to the next step. Kate questions whether Shawn is the real deal.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Lies, Cameras and Lingerie
programme.desc: When the entrepreneurial spirit turns two best friends into mortal enemies, one woman goes on the run.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: If Looks Could Kill
programme.desc: Model Tara Lambert gets a hitman to kill her husband's ex and put her in a woodchipper, unaware that cameras were rolling.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer at College
programme.desc: College lacrosse player Yeardley Love is found dead in her college apartment. But the community is left stunned when cops arrest a member of a wealthy, prominent family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Crash
programme.desc: Battling exhaustion, Wild Bill and his crew face the full wrath of the bomb cyclone. A snapped tendon puts the Summer Bay down a man. Josh gambles on crab-rich grounds in a costly venture north. An injured Mac fights to get Junior through the storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: Mandy takes the helm to face a disgruntled Northwestern crew after an injury knocks Sig out of his wheelhouse. Damaged hydraulics and an umbilical hernia deal Keith a double gut punch on the Wizard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: Stuffed pots come at a price as Jake scrambles to repair a slack tank before it kills his crab or capsizes the Saga. Josh and Casey's rudder fails in heavy traffic and Wild Bill's new greenhorn makes an easy target for an out-of-control picking hook.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Danger Close
programme.desc: Josh and Casey race to haul pots as engine failure threatens their delivery window. As seawater destroys his hydraulic motors, Junior attempts a risky high seas delivery of three new motors. Harley and his crew bang heads over his fishing strategy.

programme.title: American Chopper: The Last Ride
programme.desc: After hearing about demolition plans for the old Orange County Choppers building, Junior asks his dad to build one last bike together in the old shop. Senior agrees but the father-son team's clashing styles threaten to throw the entire project off track.

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: Cameras follow Paul Teutul Sr. and his son, Paul Jr., who create custom motorcycles.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Danger Close
programme.desc: Josh and Casey race to haul pots as engine failure threatens their delivery window. As seawater destroys his hydraulic motors, Junior attempts a risky high seas delivery of three new motors. Harley and his crew bang heads over his fishing strategy.

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: Cameras follow Paul Teutul Sr. and his son, Paul Jr., who create custom motorcycles.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Hot Hot Heat
programme.desc: The Rookies battle their biggest claim yet, and each other. Col's Crew must bring out the old machines to hunt a new opal seam. It's heating up as the Fire Crew race a fuel leak chasing legendary red fire opal.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Machine Mayhem
programme.desc: It's last chance for The Rookies' partnership. Col's crew is on a crash course as his reoccurring illness slows them down, while the Cooke Brothers fight busted hoses and breakdowns in the quest to strike it rich.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Rookie Justin ropes in a stranger in a mad dash to get his excavator across a busy highway. Opal Queen Kelly battles a new claim with a new partner. Then, with Col struck down with illness, Aaron and Greg must push on at Dragonfly without him.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Blue Fire Opal or Bust
programme.desc: Justin recruits his fiancée Becky to save him from financial ruin. The Fire Crew face deadly reptiles and a snapped suspension in search blue fire opal. The Cooke Brothers go 21 metres under, desperate to get their hands on the first opal of the season.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Race Against Time
programme.desc: The Rookies battle busted hoses and finally hit treasure. Boulder Boys Aaron and Greg bring in an old monster about to self-destruct, and at their wash plant, The Cooke Brothers race to beat the worst drought in a decade.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Desperate Times, Desperate Measures
programme.desc: The Rookies Justin and Becky risk their lives underground, desperate for a find. Meanwhile Opal hunting legend Col Duff is back to take on the Outback hunting long forgotten treasure.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Battling Back
programme.desc: The Fire Crew's season rests on a knife-edge as they struggle to battle their way back from a disastrous setback. The Opal Queen battles rock hard walls alone, desperate to find opal. The Boulder Boys abandon their drill and hunt for opal by hand.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Make or Break
programme.desc: Rookie Justin tackles a deal that could make or break him. The Boulder Boys race to save their claim from a monsoon flood. And on their last dig of the season The Cooke Brothers finally hit pay dirt.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Last Chance
programme.desc: It's the end of the mining season and the last chance for all the opal hunting teams to make enough cash to survive. The Rookies gamble their hopes on one last haul of opal. The Opal Queen makes a final desperate dig.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Origins of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Josh travels to his ancestral home of Great Britain to explore the origins of Stonehenge. From high in the air to deep under the sea, he finds an unexpected network of monuments that could have inspired one of history's most mystical locations.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for the Golden Owl
programme.desc: John Gates joins treasure hunters in the search for the Golden Owl, worth half a million dollars. A book of riddles gives cryptic clues as to where the Owl statuette is hidden.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Blackbeard's Hidden Gold
programme.desc: Josh dives for the lost treasure of the legendary pirate Blackbeard.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: India's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to India in search of Dwarka, a mythical kingdom swallowed by the ocean. To find evidence that the golden city is real, Josh dives into the Arabian Sea and visits a dig site that could rewrite history.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: It's a Rat's Nest
programme.desc: Doug must get a handle on his hoarding problem or he risks losing both of his houses.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Tiny Monsters
programme.desc: Sherry's hoard has broken up her marriage and authorities are threatening to take away her children and condemn her home.

programme.title: Counting On: A Duggar Bachelor Pad
programme.desc: Jessa and Ben go on their first road trip with three kids, hoping they don't lose any kids along the way. Some of the Duggars go to the Bahamas to help after a hurricane. Jed and Jere show off their bachelor pad. The family competes in a corn maze race.

programme.title: Counting On: Still Growing: The Duggar Dash
programme.desc: It's hard to decide which Duggar is the most competitive, so they decide to put it to a test.The family splits into four teams and Michelle sends them on an exciting race around town.

programme.desc: Jeremy takes a skateboarding lesson with ex-pro skateboarder Brian Sumner. Later, Kendra goes into labor. As contractions intensify quickly, her birth team worries that her doctor might not arrive in time.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Blackout, Bleedout
programme.desc: Two fishermen get stuck on the same lure; a cheerleader with a sprained finger nearly dies of an unexpected cause; and a power outage in the hospital foils the ER team's effort to get a dying patient to the O.R.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: The Flu Scare
programme.desc: Flu season strikes the Waldrop house as Courtney and Eric fight to keep all their kids healthy. Layke's follow up visit to the cardiologist brings an unexpected result. Courtney and Eric disagree on the best plan for remodeling their house.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Valentines - Times Nine!
programme.desc: Courtney bonds with the big boys while Eric plays Mr. Mom, watching the babies and planning a Valentine's Day surprise for Courtney. After a big scare in the house, the Waldrops must decide whether to stay in their home during the remodel or rent a house.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Vacation: Impossible
programme.desc: As major construction begins on their house, Courtney and Eric decide to take their first family vacation with the sextuplets. But between baby and big boy meltdowns, they struggle to keep everyone happy at the same time.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Mouse Mania and Wigged Out
programme.desc: Janet has spent the last 30 years collecting over 5,000 Mickey memorabilia items. Tamis has been obsessed with wearing wigs for the past 20 years and has over 2,000 wigs.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Mannequin Invasion and Carrot Queen
programme.desc: Chad Michael's collection of over 300 mannequins has taken over every room of his house. Zizi's has 35 carrot tattoos and every room in her house has a carrot theme.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Airline Addict and Crazy for Capybaras
programme.desc: Anthony has been collecting aviation memorabilia since he was five-years-old. Melanie is crazy about her pet capybara and takes him for walks and teaches him tricks.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Raggedy Ann and A Rat's Tale
programme.desc: Chantal's 19 pet rats are more than just pets; she considers them her children.

programme.title: My Kid's Obsession
programme.desc: Across the USA, five kids show off their unique and unusual collections they've spent years gathering. Discover the world's largest collection of fishing lures, an unusual set of vacuums, and one kid's fascination with fans.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Annjeannette's Story
programme.desc: When Annjeanette was nine, a campaign was established to send her to fat camp. She hated that her weight had become a source of public shame and she has struggled to overcome her food addiction. Now, she must change her habits to save her life.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brandi and Kandi's Story
programme.desc: Twins Kandi and Brandi have a combined weight totaling over 1100lbs. These inseparable twins fear losing each other to obesity, so they make a change together.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brianne's Story
programme.desc: At over 700 pounds, Brianne undertakes a weight-loss journey to save her own life and faces an unexpected challenge to her fragile progress when her husband suffers a heart attack on a birthday she will never forget.

programme.title: Movie: Titanic
programme.desc: Two social opposites meet and fall in love while on Titanic's maiden voyage.

programme.title: Siesta Key: Can I Talk to You for a Second?
programme.desc: Juliette and Sam's relationship progresses, and Chloe and Madisson try to hash out their differences. Kelsey finds out Garrett has been training an ex-fling. Madisson and Ish aren't on the same page about their future.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Yelawolf
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo are joined by rapper Yelawolf to crash some expensive cars in 'lambo slambos', drink some nasty 'bleakwater', and be the victims of some 'second-hand slams'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo take sexy to the extreme in '50 shades of cray', get zero help in 'service with a shrug' and check out the heartland in 'jolly ranchers'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige VanZant
programme.desc: In this episode, UFC star and MMA champ Paige VanZant joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to celebrate some first- time fighters.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXVI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo discuss whether some parents should put down their phone, advise us all to trust nobody and find out that all heroes wear capes.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Mike Holston II
programme.desc: Animal specialist Mike Holston re-joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to check out some cheeky monkeys, try and get over their critterphobia and try to keep some rope-a-dopes grounded.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXIX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo peruse some fine china, start the totally original hashtag 'women crush Wednesdays’ and check on a few patients who are too gross to diagnose.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jordan Clarkson
programme.desc: Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson hangs out with Rob, Steelo and Chanel. They throw down Jammies, observe the Tongue Cam and learn about Gettin' Laked.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jasper and Errol
programme.desc: Jasper and Errol join Rob, Steelo and Chanel to see who 'can't feel the heat', get in time with some 'synchronized suckers', and greet some 'polite fighters'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Vitaly Zdorovetskiy
programme.desc: Youtube Prankster Vitaly Zdorovetskiy joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to meet some natural born pranksters, travel to the broviet union and learn a few swole shortcuts.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXXI
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel go 'flame dumb,' test out their hand skills in 'snatch masters' and slow-mo man's best friend in 'goooodddd booooyyyy.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Nate Robinson
programme.desc: Professional basketball star Nate Robinson takes a look at some fellow sharpshooters, plays some supermarket sports, and joins in the celebration with the dunk cam.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo discover things that provoke more questions than answers, getting old and having expired filters, and the shocking moments that make us mind-melted.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Big Black II
programme.desc: Big Black is back and he's showing off Black Lavender. See what happens When Bad Ideas Go Worse and people suffer a Failure to Launch.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling V
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling, and Chanel enjoy some dirty getaways.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Grossest Episode Ever
programme.desc: Things get grosser than ever when Rob, Chanel, and Steelo check out some talented ass masters, avoid boogie knights, and discover the disgusting side of mother birding.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub
programme.desc: The hosts of The Fighter and The Kid podcast, Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub, join Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about other "Fighters and Funny People."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Iliza Shlesinger
programme.desc: Comedy's Queen Bee Iliza Shlesinger joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to witness the drunken 'Party Goblin' phenomena and share the extent of her 'Pupsession.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Ridickys
programme.desc: It's awards show time on 'Ridiculousness,' and Rob, Steelo and Chanel can't wait to give out Ridicky Awards to worthy winners from throughout the series. Some of the award categories include The Biggest Dick, The Freedom Falcon and The Grand Slam.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Kristen
programme.desc: Mike and Kristen met on Facebook but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Brittany and Bryon
programme.desc: When Brittany, a single mom, finds love online with Bryon, a marine who may get deployed again to Iraq, she seeks Nev and Max's help before she runs out of time to discover if her seemingly perfect military man is real.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Felicia
programme.desc: Young couples take their online-only romantic relationships offline and meet in person.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Paris and Tara
programme.desc: Paris enlists Nev and Max to help her figure out who has been catfishing her for the past four years. As the guys investigate, they make a shocking discovery that casts suspicion onto Paris herself.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Red and Jalissa
programme.desc: For the last six years, Red's been talking to Jalissa and her group of celebrity besties. Hot on the trail to meet Jalissa in LA, Nev and Kamie help Red uncover a truth that might turn her Hollywood love story into a tragedy.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Alfred and Adonis
programme.desc: Moving on from a toxic breakup, Alfred's thirsty to find Adonis, the elusive man of his dreams. But as they dig for answers, word that Nev and Kamie are in town leads to the most explosive confrontation in the Catfish history.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sparkayla and Maritha
programme.desc: Kiana's convinced that her wife Sparkayla is being catfished by a girl claiming to be her long-lost sister! Nev and Kamie perform the first ever DNA test in Catfish history to uncover the real roots of this family deception.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jesus and Alexis
programme.desc: Nev and Kamie receive an anonymous email from a whistleblower reporting a catfishing! But when our hosts arrive to help the named victim, they uncover a deeper conspiracy of deception that only the secret informant can solve.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joseph and Sabrina
programme.desc: Joseph's been sending sexy Sabrina his love and his money but his sister doesn't buy Sabrina's lies and calls in Nev and Kamie for some truth. What they discover is so shocking that they wonder if Sabrina's lies will ever end.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: William and Jamie
programme.desc: Akirra contacts Catfish for help to stop her bae's online ex, Jamie, from harassing her and her boyfriend William. But the script is flipped when Nev and Kamie find out that William has received thousands of dollars from Jamie.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Danielle and BJ
programme.desc: Nev and Kamie get a letter from a woman worried that her friend Danielle is being catfished by a guy named BJ. BJ comforted Danielle when she was shot, but now she needs to know who she's really been dating for the past six years.

programme.title: Shark Tank

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A duo from Dallas, Texas pitch their eclectic sock of the month club subscription while standing in their boxer shorts. Also, two men show their unique line of wooden bowties, lapel accessories and men's fedoras.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Sports Day
programme.desc: Every summer the Chrisleys attend a family friend's annual sports day BBQ, and every year they are put to shame. Determined to break their losing streak, Todd's competitive spirit pushes his family to their breaking points.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to their South Carolina lake house, which also happens to be in the town where Todd grew up. Todd decides the kids are in need of a family history lesson, but the kids end up turning it around on him.

programme.desc: Chase and Savannah have just graduated high school, and a celebration is in the works. As spirits run high, Todd plans on surprising Savannah by inviting her boyfriend Blaire. She has decided to take a break from him, however, threatening Todd's plans.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Achievements
programme.desc: Disappointed that he missed Savannah being crowned Miss Tennessee Teen USA, Todd plans a party to celebrate. Later, tension builds when it becomes clear the party is more for Todd than Savannah.

programme.desc: When Chase asserts his independence by getting a tattoo of a Bible verse, Todd tries everything in his power to entice Chase to remove it. Meanwhile, Savannah is failing her college Bible class.

programme.desc: Molly shares some of her favourite round recipes so that everybody gets to be a little bit baller. She makes crispy Asian scotch eggs and two versions of meatball: ground turkey meatballs and meatless meatball sliders with a twist.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night Out Night In
programme.desc: With the kids out on the town at a street party, Ree Drummond and Ladd enjoy a night in. They're cooking surf and turf skewers with Cajun hollandaise, a romaine wedge salad with loaded ranch dressing and rummy pineapples and cream to keep things sweet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All in One
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making non-stop all-in-one wonders! There's a simple chicken and dressing sheet pan supper, lemon, basil and shrimp risotto in a skillet, the easiest ramen pho and a layered portable Greek salad in a jar.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Easy Comfort
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes comfort food the easy way starting with carrot cake French toast, a tasty combo of two comforting classics in one make-ahead breakfast. There's also corn and green chili chowder made fast in a multi pot, a butterscotch lava cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Stanton and Paige
programme.desc: Ree's daughter and her friend request Chinese food for their sleepover dinner. Ree whips up cashew chicken, edamame fried rice and quick pan-fried kale. The next morning for breakfast its homemade granola for strawberry granola.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: B-Man
programme.desc: It's dinner for two for Ree and her son, Bryce, so she's treating him to all of his favourite meals.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Building Pens

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pitch Black

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Shell Shocked

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Can't Give Up

programme.title: Good Bones: Decaying Duplex Gets a Transformation
programme.desc: Mina and Karen snag a four-bedroom, two-bathroom duplex for only $4,000. But with one of the worst foundations they've ever seen combined with unsafe floor joists on the second floor, Mina expects to spend upwards of $200,000 on the renovation.

programme.title: Good Bones: Big House, Big Potential

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Biggest Little House in Nashville
programme.desc: Page and DeRon buy a cozy North Nashville cottage that stretches the definition of a 'third bedroom.' The pair devise some ingenious renovations to make this incredibly tiny house feel huge, however they encounter some major roadblocks along the way.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Basement or Bust
programme.desc: Page Turner and DeRon Jenkins take on a neglected brick ranch house in the up-and-coming neighborhood of Woodbine.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Downsize to Maximize
programme.desc: Page and DeRon get the chance to flip a cozy brick cottage in an up-and-coming neighborhood. However, in order to make the most of its limited space, they must downsize the home from three bedrooms to two, which is quite the risky thing to do with a flip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Frankenhouse
programme.desc: Flippers Page and DeRon uncover layer after layer of hidden problems as they tackle a 100-year-old house with multiple additions. They pull out all the stops to make sense of the mismatched elements and bring the house back to life.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Breaking Brick
programme.desc: Page finds a 1960s gem just outside of Nashville and buys the house without consulting DeRon. With the pressure to make a profitable flip, the two find ways to upgrade the house by creating new rooms and new problems.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Hold the Door
programme.desc: Page finds a three-bedroom house on a huge corner lot in the heart of Donelson, but the interior of the rambling ranch is cramped and confusing.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Termite Terrace
programme.desc: DeRon buys a modern, North Nashville cottage without consulting Page, hoping it will be an easy, cosmetic flip. However, things get tricky when they discover an infestation of six-legged pests that are quite literally eating them out of house and home.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Hot in Nashville
programme.desc: Page and DeRon rehab a 1950's cottage with a confusing floorplan.

programme.desc: A couple is tired of mediocre profits and asks Tarek to help with their next flip in Anaheim, CA. Even with his guidance, they struggle to make the right decisions and face an uphill battle when the local market starts to buck.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Shared Driveways and Slim Margins
programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Baptism By Fire

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Fighting All the Way to the Bank

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Failing to Plan Is Planning to Fail

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Reunion Part Two
programme.desc: Monique and Candiace address their broken relationship and the breach of trust that lead to its downfall. Robyn's future with Juan is put into question. Gizelle and Monique address their ongoing feud in hopes of finally putting it to bed.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Old Testaments, New Revelations
programme.desc: Gizelle rekindles her relationship with ex-husband and pastor Jamal Bryant, but her daughters aren't as supportive of their re-union. Ashley struggles to adjust to life as a new mom. Meanwhile, Monique introduces her parrot-child, T'Challa, to Potomac.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: The Crown Isn't So Heavy
programme.desc: Kyle's new clothing line brings the women of Beverly Hills together for New York Fashion Week, where Dorit quickly realizes Kyle's lack of experience in the fashion world could turn into a runway disaster. Erika takes the girls on a trip down memory lane.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: To Live and Text in Beverly Hills
programme.desc: While Kyle tries to attract buyers for her fashion line in New York, Erika gets big news that has her moving there. Dorit's move into a new house is marred by negative press about her finances. Meanwhile, Denise faces emergency surgery.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: First Impressions, True Confessions
programme.desc: Kyle wraps shooting on her latest film and plans a welcome home party for all the ladies, including her newest friend Garcelle. Erika's singing lesson brings up a painful childhood memory. Teddi doesn't take kindly to Sutton's criticism.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: All's Fair in Glam and War
programme.desc: Lisa Rinna and Garcelle opt out of Teddi's fitness and wellness retreat, which is far from relaxing. Kyle and Erika question Dorit's all-about-me behavior. Denise is upset when her backyard dinner party takes an R-rated turn in front of her kids.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Let the Mouse Go!
programme.desc: Lisa and Teddi butt heads over Kyle's emotional meltdown. Garcelle celebrates a milestone in her sons' lives, while Lisa struggles to stay in the shadows as her daughters launch their clothing line.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Watch With Garcelle and Dorit: Read Between the Signs
programme.desc: Erika is left seeing stars at her astrology party when old resentments flare up between Kyle, Teddi and Dorit. Denise's simmering frustration boils over in front of a speechless Lisa Rinna. After drinks, Garcelle questions a new friend's priorities.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Santa Denise
programme.desc: What promises to be a relaxing trip to Santa Barbara instead opens old wounds for Dorit, Erika, Teddi and Kyle. After feeling judged as a mother, Lisa Rinna turns the tables on Denise, forcing her to examine her own history of risqué behaviour.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Never Before Scene: Mind Your P's and BBQ's
programme.desc: Garcelle is honoured for her work with a local charity, but her acceptance speech isn't charitable to one guest. The ladies feel mom-shamed when Denise shows up to Kyle's kid-friendly barbecue without her kid.

programme.title: Movie: Logan
programme.desc: Logan, whose power to self-heal is dwindling, takes care of Professor X in hiding. A young girl, hunted by a shadowy corporation for her connection to Logan, finds them. As the three fight to escape, Logan must decide how to use his remaining powers.

programme.desc: Dom reassembles his crew to take down a criminal mastermind in command of a band of mercenary drivers.

programme.desc: Mary is a professional hit woman for one of Boston's powerful organized crime families, and she's never run into a problem that couldn't be solved at gunpoint, but her life is turned upside down when a hit gone wrong leads her to an orphaned boy.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Zulu Iklwa
programme.desc: Four new bladesmiths are put to the test when they must forge a bayonet blade and engineer it to attach to a rifle. The final two must forge the legendary African blade, the Zulu Iklwa.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Ultimate Champions Edition
programme.desc: Five former champions return for a gruelling test of skill that begins even before the first forge is ignited. Qualifying only amps up the intensity, which reaches a boiling point in the finals, where the two remaining smiths must forge the Tai Chi sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Nepalese Kukri
programme.desc: A new set of bladesmiths are tasked with the gruelling challenge of shaping four very different types of metal, each with their own unique difficulties, into a fully functional deadly weapon. After a rigorous round of testing, only two will survive.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Shotel
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths face the unpredictable challenge of taking high carbon steel and wrought iron and forging these two conflicting materials into a fully functional weapon.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Kachin Dao
programme.desc: Old nautical equipment must be used to forge-weld a new signature blade, with the additional challenge of the need to use a metal inlay technique. Two tumultuous rounds find the remaining smiths in the finals, with five days to forge the Kachin dao.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Kpinga
programme.desc: The bladesmiths are forced to layer a complex Damascus pattern into their signature style blade. In the final round, two smiths are locked in a dead heat to recreate a three-bladed African throwing knife called the kpinga.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Deer Horn Knives
programme.desc: The bladesmiths must harvest the steel from a vintage golf club to forge their signature blades. In a race against the clock, and using unconventional methods, the competitors navigate broken blades and broken spirits.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Qinglong Ji
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths take a shot at forging a signature blade from the steel rings of a whiskey barrel. They must quickly adapt when they realize there may not be enough hardenable steel to go around.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Pipe Tomahawks
programme.desc: Two smiths are eliminated after two gruelling rounds of competition, and the finalists head home to recreate an important weapon from North American history, the pipe tomahawk. The winner will claim the title of Forged in Fire Champion.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Steel Takedown Bow
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging a crusader's dagger from a thick rod of W1 steel. The finalists return home to forge their own version of Robin Hood's steel takedown bow.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Loch Ness Conspiracy

programme.desc: Ty Underwood, a transgender woman, is found shot to death in her car, leaving detectives to wonder if she may have been a victim of a hate crime. Detectives use text messages, social media posts, and surveillance footage to track down her killer.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Hidden Bodies
programme.desc: After struggles in their youth, they are setting out on new paths with new hope but then the unthinkable happens. Their horrific murders are chilling. Find out who would kill them in such a violent way and if they had any idea they were in danger.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Twisted Upside Down
programme.desc: The streets of Kalamazoo, Michigan are awash with rumors about 69-year-old, William Gray.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Truth Is Dangerous
programme.desc: Ty Underwood, a transgender woman, is found shot to death in her car, leaving detectives to wonder if she may have been a victim of a hate crime. Detectives use text messages, social media posts, and surveillance footage to track down her killer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Be Right Back
programme.desc: When Alicia DeBolt goes missing, a helpful neighbor points the finger at an older kid she's been hanging out with. When police discover a string of texts on her cell phone, the net closes in on a sadistic killer whose obsession leads to tragedy.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Clash of the Tartans
programme.desc: Southern Oregon is a campers' paradise...but for one local businessman's family a weekend in the woods will become a nightmare. Open marriages and forbidden relationships will lead to someone's watery grave.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Burning Love
programme.desc: In Ore City, Texas, firefighters extinguish a burning truck, only to reveal the charred remains of a human corpse inside. It soon becomes apparent this was no accident and that there's something very evil at play.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Welcome to Murder Street
programme.desc: An elite California Lakeside Community is rocked to its core when two well-to-do gentlemen go to war over an 18-inch property line discrepancy. One neighbor takes the dispute to new levels when he hires a hitman to permanently solve the problem.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lake of Madness
programme.desc: A family moves into their dream home on a Minnesota lake, and welcomes the single retiree who soon takes up residence next door. But a dispute over access to the water they all love escalates until one party snaps, and others pay the price in blood.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Two women living next to each other in an apartment building become fast friends until becoming sworn enemies. Each enlists their sister as reinforcements in the escalating war between them; a conflict that ends in horrifically shocking violence.

programme.title: Dateline: The Trouble in Quitman
programme.desc: When police find a mother and her son shot to death in their home in a small town in Texas, questions arise over whether the husband may have been behind the deaths.

programme.title: Dateline: The Wire
programme.desc: A young nurse was murdered in her small studio apartment with only a broken necklace and an unusual weapon found as evidence. Twenty years after the case went cold, a determined detective attempts to crack it.

programme.title: Dateline: The Wire
programme.desc: A young nurse was murdered in her small studio apartment with only a broken necklace and an unusual weapon found as evidence. Twenty years after the case went cold, a determined detective attempts to crack it.

programme.title: Dateline: A Place on the Sand
programme.desc: Keith Morrison reports on the case of a Florida motel owner who suddenly disappears. The mystery of what happened to her confounds family, friends and detectives. Will she ever be found?

programme.title: See No Evil: Someone to Watch Over Her
programme.desc: On a freezing winter night, a hardworking mother doesn't make it home from work. As dawn breaks, her body is found in a churchyard. With the city in panic, Police turn to the city's surveillance cameras... hoping they can help catch a brutal murderer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: In September 2015, Edward Lowry is found savagely beaten and stabbed to death in a parking lot in South Dakota. With little evidence left behind at the scene, can police painstakingly piece together Ed's last moments from CCTV to find his killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: Snatched on Camera
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old college student Katie Poirier vanishes while working the graveyard shift at a gas station. It's a family's worst nightmare come true. Grainy security footage reveals an answer... but leaves a community in fear.

programme.title: See No Evil: Don't Get in the Truck
programme.desc: On February 18th 2014, Emily Lambert goes missing after spending the night at a hotel bar with her new boyfriend. Two days later, she's found murdered on remote farmland. Detectives scour CCTV footage from the hotel and bar searching for her killer.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil
programme.desc: This series examines the lives and actions of history's worst dictators for answers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: The Boston Bandits
programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Hilton Head House Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Holmes travels to the beautiful island of Hilton Head, South Carolina, to advise first time homebuyers Caroline and Diego Mahecha during their search for the perfect family home. Mike goes through the houses and identifies issues.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Forever Home in Hilton Head
programme.desc: A couple search for their forever home in Hilton Head. Mike Holmes takes them through the houses and teaches the couple how to choose the best home for their present budget and their future plans.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: On a Mission in St. Petersburg
programme.desc: Mike heads to St. Petersburg, Florida, to help first-time homebuyers Heather and Jay. Along with Heather's young son, the couple plans to move into the best house they can find within their budget.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Working a Miracle in Tampa
programme.desc: Sisters Michelle and Sonia run Miracles Outreach to house girls who have aged out of the foster program, and they need a new house and Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Making Room in Florida
programme.desc: Nicole and Tariq are a fun-loving Florida couple that is ready to buy their first home, preferably with enough room for a future family. They've looked at homes and realize they don't know how to spot the kind of house problems a contractor would see.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Eyeing First Home in Englewood
programme.desc: Newlyweds Andie and Pete are ready to buy their first home in Englewood, Colorado. Mike steps in and tours their chosen homes and shows the couple what's worth a good bid and what's worth walking away from.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Off the Ranch in Colorado
programme.desc: After choosing possible houses in the Denver region, newlyweds Jennifer and Matt tour the structures with Mike, who shows them how to tell whether a home is a good buy or if it's a house that deserves a "goodbye".

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Looking Out for Lava Tubes in Kona
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are on the hunt to find an empty lot with great ocean views. They want to build a spec home on the property that they can turn around and sell in the coming year.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Skylight to the Stars and a Stunning Free-Form Lanai
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler build a brand new house in an upcountry area of the Big Island. Skylights are placed throughout the home, including a giant one in the master bedroom that will allow the homeowners to sleep under the stars.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Flipping a 1970s Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lone Star Load-Up
programme.desc: Roger is loading up on the best brisket, pork steaks and sausages the Lone Star state has to offer. Ronnie's BBQ in Johnson City attracts locals and barbecue aficionados.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Low Country Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger's in charming South Carolina for two spectacular low country cookouts: a traditional backyard pig pickin' and a classic oyster roast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Alabama BBQ
programme.desc: The American Barbecue Belt in the South stretches from the Carolinas to Texas, and today Roger heads to the heart of it - Alabama. Roger meets award-winning Pit Master Chris Lilly at Big Bob Gibson Bar-B-Q in Decatur.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pigging Out On Pork
programme.desc: One of the great wonders of the barbecue world is smoked pork shoulder. It's a big hunk of meat cooked low and slow until succulent and tender. Roger's favorite way to devour this delicious thing of beauty is in a sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent D.C. Dining
programme.desc: Michael and Jenni 'JWoww' Farley, reality TV star and winner of Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity Edition, team up to tackle the best classic barbecue, freshest farmhouse burgers and most outrageous microbrews our nation's capital has to offer.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: San Diego Surf 'n' Turf

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston: A Second Bite

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Milwaukee
programme.desc: Milwaukee may be known for its beer, but it's also home to mouth-watering classic American foods. From cheese curds and bratwurst to frozen custard and butter burgers, Andrew shows us why this Midwestern city is a great food town.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montevideo
programme.desc: Andrew digs into the culinary treasures of Uruguay's capital city, Montevideo. He explores this meaty mecca by highlighting their slow-cooked Asado meats, a thin-sliced steak sandwich called chivito, and breaded and fried beef.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Miami

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: For Brunch

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night at the Nursery/ Seas the Day
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Rockin' Roadsters!/ Safari, So Goody

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob

programme.desc: Motsuki becomes Owelette's sidekick; Motsuki traps Luna Girl on the moon.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy and the Shrinker/ Owlette and the Moonball
programme.desc: Luna Girl creates a giant moonball and hides all the toys she’s stolen inside.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four / Feelin' Antsy

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Pet Project

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Pajama Party

programme.title: Bluey: Shops / The Pool / Blue Mountains

programme.title: Bluey: Favourite Thing / Daddy Dropoff / Sleepytime
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Donald's Roadster Round-Up / The Daisy Dance!
programme.desc: On a trip to the convenience store, Donald and Pluto lose all the roadsters; The Happy Helpers take over Clarabelle's dance class.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: My Fair Pete
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Brand New Clubhouse
programme.desc: When Donald complains everyone is in his way, Mickey and pals help him build his own clubhouse.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Go-Getters
programme.desc: Detective Minnie, Secret Spy Daisy and Captain Clarabelle band together to form the Go-Getters in order to help stop a group of giant baby chicks who are running loose in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Big Balloon Race
programme.desc: Mickey helps Donald fly in the Big Balloon Race so he can win a big blue ribbon. They use stickers to patch up the balloon and an elephant helps weigh the balloon down after it flies into orbit. Later, they rescue Pete, who's stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Mouseke-Calendar
programme.desc: When the wind blows way all the pages of Minnie's daily calendar, Mickey and pals help her put it back together again and keep all of her plans up to date.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Round-Up
programme.desc: Mickey and pals have to gather the digits to put them back in their box after escaping.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Oh, Toodles!
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake is working on a surprise invention when he discovers that he is missing four of his very special tools: a shape-wrench, a hammer, a paintbrush and a whistle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Mystery
programme.desc: Kansas City Mickey sets out to find an ancient mouse-eared stone monument deep in the Hidden Jungle.

programme.title: Chuggington: Wild Safari Park / Glow Koko
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Aye, Aye Captain Mickey

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged: Two Close Friends / Mr. Bigby's Big Night
programme.desc: Mickey and Donald accidentally become handcuffed together. Later, the happy helpers help Mr. Bigby throw a birthday party for his wife.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Sporty Day / Go, Chili Dogs!
programme.desc: Mickey and friends go on adventures around Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Anchors Away/ Prospector Pups
programme.desc: Bob rents a floating house on the Mississippi River with Bingo and Rolly. Bob and the Pugs go on a Wild West-themed vacation.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mystery of the Secret Gift-Giver/ Mystery at the Cooking Contest
programme.desc: When townspeople start receiving anonymous gifts, Mira searches for the secret gift-giver. Then, Pinky's dishes for the Queen's cooking contest seem to be sabotaged.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: Bluey: Squash / Charades / Bingo
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Land of the Rising Pup / ARF-CHOO
programme.desc: The pups travel to Japan to get help from the local snow monkeys and bring back snow to save Bob's ski trip.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Daddy Delivery/ Junior Flyer JP
programme.desc: While Pip and Freddy make a delivery on Father's Day, a baby Hedgehog gets stuck atop a hill and is too afraid to come down. Pip and Freddy help JP become a Super Duper Flier again after he gets demoted for failing to take a test.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Caught Blue-Handed/ To Squeak, or not to Squeak
programme.desc: When a mysterious rash of blue spots breaks out among some of the toys in the clinic, Doc traces the 'mystery pox' back to Donny's toy monster, Glo-Bo, who had been finger-painting earlier in the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Suitcase Switcheroo / More Cowbell for Bob
programme.desc: When Bob mixes up his suitcase with another traveler, the pugs head to Spain on a mission to retrieve it. Then, Bob can't find his signature instrument for the reunion of his high school rock band.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Froginizer/ My Fair Animal
programme.desc: The Muppet Babies play superheroes. Piggy and Summer help Kermit discover his superpower.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Con/ The Hungry Games
programme.desc: Mr. Crocker creates Wonky Cosmo and Wanda clones to get into a Fairy Convention to steal all the fairies' magic. Timmy wishes Chloe could live out her favorite dystopian movie, but quickly regrets it when everyone is hungry.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Wacky Wednesday/ The Chipmunk and the Catfish
programme.desc: When one of Simon's inventions malfunctions, Jeanette and Alvin switch places. Theodore creates a fake alias online and pretends to be a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Gift/ Theo Knows Best
programme.desc: Theodore gives Dave an ugly handmade vest for his birthday and insists he wear it to an upcoming business meeting. When Theodore finds a winning lottery ticket, everyone has their own ideas on how the money should be spent.

programme.title: Movie: Alvin and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Three musically inclined chipmunks, Alvin, Simon and Theodore, meet frustrated songwriter David Seville and impress him with their singing talent.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family, they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House: Yes Man/ Friend or Faux
programme.desc: The sisters ask Lincoln to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. Lisa gets her report card and finds she failed social skills and must make a friend to get her grade up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goodbye, Krabby Patty?
programme.desc: Squidward must make Patrick and SpongeBob friends again after they learn that sponges and sea stars aren't ususally friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Christmas Who?
programme.desc: Nobody in Bikini Bottom has ever heard of Christmas or Santa Claus until Sandy tells them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It's a SpongeBob Christmas!
programme.desc: Plankton gets all of Bikini Bottom's residents on Santa's 'naughty' list.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Someone's in the Kitchen With Sandy/ The Inside Job
programme.desc: Plankton steals Sandy's fur to disguise himself as Sandy and get the Krabby Patty formula. Plankton goes inside SpongeBob's head to get the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chaperone/ Employee of the Month
programme.desc: SpongeBob agrees to take Mr. Krab's daughter to the prom; Bob and Squidward battle it out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SB-129/ Karate Choppers
programme.desc: Squidward ends up in a freezer; Bob and Sandy's incessant karate sparring wreaks havoc.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dumped
programme.desc: One day, Gary starts following Pat around and SpongeBob can't figure out why. At first, it doesn't bother him, but slowly he grows more and more jealous and becomes determined to learn the reason.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea In Her Dome/ Donut Of Shame/ The Krusty Plate
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to help Sandy rid her Tree Dome of fleas. Patrick accidentally takes a donut and is wracked with guilt. SpongeBob battles a persistent speck of food that is on a plate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sharks vs. Pods/ CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: Bob and Pat's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.
